overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rain-soaked, neon-lit Night City intersection at night, transitioning through a busy commercial district, into a narrow alleyway, and finally into a derelict encampment with bodies. The atmosphere features heavy acid rain with distinctive yellow-green haze, reflective wet surfaces, and dense cyberpunk urban architecture.

events.description: crossing the wide intersection with a crowd of pedestrians holding umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking across the glowing green crosswalk with other pedestrians in the heavy rain

notable_agents.action: person with glowing blue umbrella walking ahead of the camera
car driving slowly on the wet road alongside the crosswalk

entered.detail: glowing green WALK text painted on the wet asphalt surface
large illuminated corporate signage on the building facade
multiple large digital advertisements with purple and red neon lighting
tall palm trees lining the street against the yellow haze
street infrastructure with traffic signals and speed limit signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a busy cyberpunk intersection at night, with heavy acid rain creating a yellow-green haze. The camera crosses a glowing green crosswalk surrounded by pedestrians with umbrellas, passing neon billboards and the distinctive Delamain building sign while cars drive past on the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street sidewalk with bus shelters and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past illuminated bus stops and benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting alone on an illuminated bench
pedestrian with umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: futuristic glass and metal bus stop shelter with integrated seating
benches with glowing orange light strips underneath
elevated highway or monorail track running overhead
tall street lights with linear LED light strips

segments.scene_description: Moving along the main street sidewalk, the scene features less crowded conditions with scattered pedestrians. The camera passes futuristic bus shelters and glowing benches while the Delamain sign remains visible in the background. The wet concrete reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with graffiti and overhead walkways

events.description: turns right from the main street into a narrow alleyway between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: turning into and navigating through the narrow graffiti-covered alleyway

notable_agents.action: person with glowing blue umbrella walking toward the camera in the narrow passage

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with metal shutters and graffiti tags
metal bridge structure connecting buildings above the alley
colorful spray paint murals and tags on the concrete surfaces
scattered garbage bags and litter accumulated on the wet ground
chain link fence with metal slats blocking off sections

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrow, enclosed alleyway that provides shelter from the rain. The walls are covered in graffiti and metal shutters, with an overhead walkway bridge visible above. Trash and debris litter the ground as the camera moves deeper into the passage, encountering a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict encampment with makeshift shelters and debris

events.description: exits the narrow alley into an open derelict area with makeshift tents and scattered debris
discovers multiple bodies and extensive debris scattered throughout the encampment

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the derelict encampment examining the aftermath and bodies

notable_agents.action: dead body lying face down on a dirty mattress among the debris
another corpse partially covered by trash and rubble

entered.detail: orange and gray camping tents set up in the open derelict area
scattered trash, damaged furniture, and rubble covering the ground
wrecked cars and trucks abandoned in the background
large concrete wall blocking the far end of the encampment
tangled electrical wires and cables strung between structures

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the scene opens into a derelict encampment with makeshift tents and scattered debris. The area shows signs of violence with bodies lying among the trash and damaged furniture. Overhead cables crisscross above the muddy ground as the camera explores the aftermath, passing concrete barriers and wrecked vehicles in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit city intersection into the grim silence of a derelict urban encampment. It begins by crossing a glowing green crosswalk amidst a yellow-green acid rain haze, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and the bright Delamain building sign. As the camera moves along the main sidewalk, the crowds thin and the environment shifts toward a series of futuristic bus shelters and glowing benches reflecting off the wet concrete. The scene then turns sharply into a narrow, graffiti-covered alleyway that provides shelter from the rain, moving past metal shutters and overhead bridges toward a lone pedestrian. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into a muddy wasteland of makeshift tents and scattered debris, where the neon glow fades into a scene of violence marked by bodies and wrecked vehicles.
